vocab.meaning: những âm thanh hỗn tạp của thành phố
vocab.example: While many find it jarring, I actually enjoy the cacophony of the city as it makes me feel connected to the pulse of life.

vocab.meaning: những âm thanh ngọt ngào, dịu dàng
vocab.example: The dulcet tones of a harp can instantly lower my stress levels after a taxing day at work.
There is a subtle elegance in the rustle of silk that I find oddly satisfying and sophisticated.

vocab.meaning: tiếng vỗ nhẹ nhàng có nhịp điệu (của nước)
vocab.example: The rhythmic lapping of lake water against the shore is the ultimate soundtrack for meditation.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui sướng về thính giác
vocab.example: Listening to a high-fidelity recording of a symphony orchestra is, for me, a state of pure auditory bliss.

vocab.meaning: tiếng bước chân khe khẽ, bị nén lại
vocab.example: I love the sound of muffled footsteps on fresh snow; it enhances the sense of winter isolation.

vocab.meaning: tiếng máy móc chạy vù vù/rì rì
vocab.example: The low whirring of machinery in a quiet workshop can be quite therapeutic and grounding for some reason.

vocab.meaning: sự phát âm rõ ràng, sắc nét
vocab.example: I am particularly fond of the crisp articulation found in professional voice-over work or stage acting.
The hollow echo of footsteps in an empty cathedral creates an atmosphere of immense grandeur and history.

vocab.meaning: những nốt nhạc nghịch tai (nhưng đầy tính nghệ thuật)
vocab.example: In avant-garde jazz, I enjoy how discordant notes eventually resolve into a beautiful, unexpected harmony.
